author: atalman
text:
### 🐛 Describe the bug

Linux Build failures: <https://github.com/pytorch/vision/actions/runs/12068108802> Tuesday Nov 28.

caused by Triton being compiled under Manylinux 2.28:

```
    from .autotuner import (Autotuner, Config, Heuristics, autotune, heuristics)
  File "/__w/_temp/conda_environment_12068108802/lib/python3.9/site-packages/triton/runtime/autotuner.py", line 9, in <module>
    from .jit import KernelInterface
  File "/__w/_temp/conda_environment_12068108802/lib/python3.9/site-packages/triton/runtime/jit.py", line 12, in <module>
    from ..runtime.driver import driver
  File "/__w/_temp/conda_environment_12068108802/lib/python3.9/site-packages/triton/runtime/driver.py", line 1, in <module>
    from ..backends import backends
  File "/__w/_temp/conda_environment_12068108802/lib/python3.9/site-packages/triton/backends/__init__.py", line 50, in <module>
    backends = _discover_backends()
  File "/__w/_temp/conda_environment_12068108802/lib/python3.9/site-packages/triton/backends/__init__.py", line 43, in _discover_backends
    compiler = _load_module(name, os.path.join(root, name, 'compiler.py'))
  File "/__w/_temp/conda_environment_12068108802/lib/python3.9/site-packages/triton/backends/__init__.py", line 12, in _load_module
    spec.loader.exec_module(module)
  File "/__w/_temp/conda_environment_12068108802/lib/python3.9/site-packages/triton/backends/amd/compiler.py", line 2, in <module>
    from triton._C.libtriton import ir, passes, llvm, amd
torch._dynamo.exc.BackendCompilerFailed: backend='inductor' raised:
ImportError: /lib64/libm.so.6: version `GLIBC_2.27' not found (required by /__w/_temp/conda_environment_12068108802/lib/python3.9/site-packages/triton/_C/libtriton.so)

Set TORCH_LOGS="+dynamo" and TORCHDYNAMO_VERBOSE=1 for more information


You can suppress this exception and fall back to eager by setting:
    import torch._dynamo
    torch._dynamo.config.suppress_errors = True
```

### Versions

0.20.0
